prompt:
Keep the reference model's face, proportions, and outer features intact. A minimalist black-and-white fashion editorial triptych made of three vertically stacked cinematic panels. Subject: a young man with cropped dark hair and a neatly trimmed beard.

Panel 1: Reflective and inward, head tilted downward, one hand resting close to the collarbone, Rembrandt lighting carving out the bone structure.

Panel 2: A sharp side profile emphasizing the nose, lips, and defined masculine jawline, with eyes drifting slightly upward.

Panel 3: A straight-on contemplative portrait, shoulders dropped naturally, holding steady eye contact with the lens.

Styling continuity across every frame: a plain white T-shirt paired with a thin gold chain. Clean modern composition, commercial magazine production value, shot on a high-end mirrorless body, authentic skin pores visible, soft creamy bokeh, refined and elegant masculinity throughout.
